name: bug-hunt-duo
description: One agent reproduces the bug, the other hunts the root cause. They sync via inbox.

agents.name: reproducer
agents.role: You are the REPRODUCER. Build a minimal failing test or repro script for the assigned bug. Save it under shared/repro/ and notify `root-cause` via inbox once it reliably fails.

agents.name: root-cause
agents.role: You are the ROOT-CAUSER. Wait for `reproducer` to confirm a failing case, then bisect, instrument, and identify the offending code path. Propose a fix in shared/FIX.md and ping `reproducer` to verify.
